summary: The source restricts n to at most 1000, so the principal incremental triangular scan performs at most 45 iterations and does not produce a reliable timing distinction from the fixed integer formula.

workload_bound.source_constraint: n is an integer from 1 through 1000

replacement_checks.evidence: The reference evaluates the triangular-number root with one fixed-width integer square root and a constant number of arithmetic operations.
The certificate regression verifies every legal n from 1 through 1000 against an independent incremental triangular-capacity oracle.
